system: TFM Production ERP — budget & accounting knowledge index

core_principle.rule: Two ledgers: estimates in BudgetLineItem tree, actuals in ProjectTransaction; reconciled ONLY by accountCode at cost-center grain.

budget.revised_budget: Σ lines ± APPROVED transfers + APPROVED overages
population_paths: crew labour blocks (shoot vs prep/wrap rates)

accounting_core.cost_report: live: EFC = Actual + ETC; Variance = RevisedBudget − EFC; CostReportSnapshot freezes

amortization.behavior: allocation run posts per-episode transactions under each episode's period locks

fields.zatcaUuid: 36-char invoice UUID, unique across ZATCA ecosystem
fields.zatcaIcv: Invoice Counter Value — strictly sequential per EGS unit
fields.zatcaXmlHash: hash of this signed UBL 2.1 XML
fields.zatcaPreviousInvoiceHash: PIH — cryptographic chain to preceding invoice
fields.zatcaCryptographicStamp: ECDSA stamp (simplified: device CSID stamp; standard: ZATCA stamp on clearance)
fields.zatcaQrCode: base64 TLV QR incl. stamp, public key, ECDSA signature (Phase 2)

zatca_phase2.model: B2B/B2G real-time clearance before issue; B2C simplified reported within 24h; UBL 2.1 XML
zatca_phase2.populated_by: fatoora clearance middleware ONLY — never hand-entered; CSID credentials in backend/.env

fields.jordanFawateeryQR: ISTD-issued QR after validation — required on customer invoice

jordan_jofotara.model: clearance — validate before issue; mandatory all B2B/B2C/B2G since 2025-04-01; non-JoFotara invoices ineligible for VAT deduction

fields: dueDate default = 10th of month after payment (stored per row)
withholding_tax.behavior: payment run splits: vendor net + WHT accrual; treasury ages remittances

uae_rcm.action: auto-post Output VAT liability + Input VAT recoverable, net cash zero, origin SYSTEM_RCM, linked + co-voided
uae_rcm.article_53_block: Input VAT recovery blocked for ENTERTAINMENT category — reads JurisdictionTaxRule.rules.blockedInputTax, no hardcoded country logic

uae_ct_settlement.shape: pure settleCorporateTax(liability, credits[]) + audited journal pairs

fx_revaluation.rate: month-end spot from master FX snapshot
fx_revaluation.posting: unrealized gain/loss to dedicated account 6810, origin SYSTEM_FX_REVAL, auto-reversing, excluded from per-account EFC

sox_pattern.rule: NO hard deletes on ProjectTransaction at service layer; void(id, reason) → original preserved as VOID + canceling entry (reversesId); VOID excluded from all computed figures; DB trigger rejects DELETE as belt-and-braces

routes.POST production/e-invoicing/fatoora/clea: KSA UBL XML → ZATCA real-time clearance; persists stamp/hash/uuid/QR
routes.POST production/e-invoicing/fawateery/su: Jordan encrypted UBL 2.1 → ISTD; persists QR
routes.POST production/costing/p-cards/envelope: ingest P-Card envelopes; balanced Dr expense / Cr card-clearing lines; receipts attached immutably
routes.GET production/costing/incentives/qspi/:: QSPI 40% base vs ≤10% uplift criteria tracker (reads seeded Qatar IncentiveProgram)

api_extensions.secrets_rule: ZATCA CSID / ISTD keys only in backend/.env

columns: Current Weekly Spend = actuals − previous LOCKED weekly snapshot

pre_lock_guard.significance: first hard bridge production ↔ core accounting (src/accounting trial-balance + bank-rec)

project_entity_tb_audit_pack.status: SPEC (engine) / IMPLEMENTED (complianceRules schema + seeded per program)
project_entity_tb_audit_pack.driver: IncentiveProgram.complianceRules { auditRequired, auditorRequirement, auditDeadlineDays, dedicatedBankAccount, localEntityRequired, qualifyingSpendRules, eligibilityConditions[] }
project_entity_tb_audit_pack.balancing_identity: funding received = cash in bank + advances outstanding + costs incurred − liabilities unpaid

AE_AbuDhabi_ADFC.auditor: ADFC-pre-approved independent (entertainment experience); Audited Expenditure Statement + working sheets
AE_AbuDhabi_ADFC.qualifyingSpend: ADQPE: UAE-resident crew + AD-licensed vendors, VAT excluded

SA_FilmSaudi.auditor: final audit approved by Saudi Film Commission before payment
SA_FilmSaudi.localEntity: KSA register or Saudi co-production partner; pre-approval before PP

US_GA.auditor: mandatory since 2023: GDOR or GDOR-certified Eligible Auditor (GDOR reviews third-party audits)

US_CA.auditor: CPA Agreed-Upon-Procedures report; CPA independent of production accounting + CFC orientation

US_NY.auditor: ESD program review; no mandatory CPA audit found — verify per allocation letter

CA_PSTC.auditor: audited cost report; CAVCO/CRA records access

UK_AVEC.auditor: Companies Act 2006 s.1212-eligible accountant's report at BFI final certification (cultural-test C/D, co-productions)

enforcement: dedicatedBankAccount → BankAccount.projectId link required before claim advances (SPEC)
auditRequired → project-entity TB + Audit Pack export (TB, bank rec, AP listing, qualifying-spend schedule, locked weekly snapshots)
auditDeadlineDays → claim-tracker countdown from calendar-anchored wrap
qualifyingSpendRules → per-program qualifying flag on transactions

integrity_rules: all new rows are ProjectTransactions matched by accountCode (two-ledger preserved)
every write through assertOpen; every destructive path through void()
LOCKED artifacts immutable forever; corrections forward-posted
jurisdiction logic from JurisdictionTaxRule data, never country ifs
historical projects unchanged; capabilities apply forward
implementation_order: weekly report engine + snapshot lock + reconciliation guard

ui_landing_spots.Cost Report tab: weekly-lock bar with reconciliation status lights

key_endpoints_implemented.ledger: GET|POST ledger, PATCH :id/status, GET ap-aging/:projectId, POST pay-selected, GET periods/:projectId
key_endpoints_implemented.dood_calendar: GET scheduling/dood-matrix, POST dood-to-globals, GET calendar, GET callsheet-data

files.core_accounting_bridge: backend/src/accounting/* (trial balance, bank rec — consumed by weekly report guard)
